---
title: "Exercise 10: Governance of data analytics"
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
- Analyze how data analytics creates strategic value within a given organizational context.
- Identify ethical and legal risks in analytics initiatives and propose mitigation strategies.
:::

::: callout-note
TODO; this could be based on a case study
:::


## Exam prep

TODO : include specific questions/tasks that could be included in the exam.

::: {.callout-tip title="Session 10 survey"}
Before you wrap up, please complete the Session 10 survey here: [{{< var sessions.session_10.survey_url >}}]({{< var sessions.session_10.survey_url >}}){target="_blank"}. Thank you 🙏
:::
